global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on travel services.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel service that combines hotel and flight bookings.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.description: A large oval and a rectangle in a muted color, positioned centrally.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle with rounded corners, centrally placed, featuring a solid color.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' in a clear, modern font.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The word 'DriftPass' in a prominent, stylized font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: discount percentage
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in a bold font, located at the bottom left.

elements.label: sale label
elements.description: A small, bold label saying 'SALE' in a bright color at the top right corner.
